---
title: "Quasi-Experimental Design Labs"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

<div class="landing-stack">

::: {.hero-panel}
<span class="hero-eyebrow">Evaluation design knowledge base</span>

# Build the design before you estimate

Quasi-Experimental Design Labs organizes working material for quasi-experimental evaluation into two practical routes: concise method notes and worksheet-style labs. The aim is to move from method selection to design discipline without losing the thread of the original policy question.

::: {.cta-row}
[Start with Notes](notes/index.qmd){.cta-button}
[Open Labs](labs/index.qmd){.cta-button .secondary}
:::
:::
